subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call and have answered thee with this Hidden Tablet, that thou mayest be assured of His mercy which hath preceded all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و اجبناک بهذا اللوح الممنوع لتوقن برحمته التی سبقت الکائنات و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
